label: base-character
prompt: A friendly, easygoing 52-year-old Caucasian man, a relatable everyday dad. Short greying brown hair, clean-shaven or light stubble, warm blue-grey eyes, weathered natural skin with smile lines. Wearing a plain solid-colour casual shirt or sweater, no logos or graphics. Hyper-realistic photograph with super-detailed true-to-life skin texture: visible pores, fine lines, subtle natural blemishes and freckles, slight uneven skin tone and natural imperfections, not airbrushed and not too perfect. Natural daylight lighting, front-view close-up portrait looking directly at the camera, passport-style, only the close-up portrait.
